questionHtml:
Consider the following equilibrium reaction.

2N2O (g) + O2 (g) ⇌ 4NO (g)        ΔH = +16 kJ

Which change will move the equilibrium to the right?

A. Decrease in pressure

B. Decrease in temperature

C. Increase in [NO]

D. Decrease in [O2]
